name: Fanny/Guide
intro: Fanny is notoriously known to be one of the most slippery yet hardest heroes to play in the game due to her unique 2nd skill that grants her unchallenged mobility which however requires high skill to pull it off and her 1st skill combined with 2nd skill and passive makes her damage extremely lethal even in the early stages of the game. Fanny is usually played as a jungler that is heavily reliant on the blue buff to start spamming away on her foes and finishing them off with ultimate . However, she's a hero that must not die since she's more likely to be a burden than a powerhouse as she requires high knowledge of mechanics, map awareness and fast dexterity.
